content.text: A limit describes the value a function approaches. Limit exists if Left-Hand Limit (LHL) = Right-Hand Limit (RHL).

content.name: Differentiation Rules
content.note: Derivative represents the instantaneous rate of change.

content.name: Integration Rules
content.formula: \int x^n dx = \frac{x^{n+1}}{n+1} + C \\ \int \sin x dx = -\cos x + C
content.note: Integration is the reverse of differentiation.
